sme_leads.notes: Unisex hair salon operating solely via Facebook and Fresha bookings with no dedicated website, missing out on local organic search traffic.
Active on Facebook and Instagram but lacks a standalone site; Shirley High Street footfall makes a conversion-optimised website a strong opportunity.
Family-run Southampton plumber relying entirely on Facebook with no website — no phone number publicly listed, making them virtually unfindable by new customers online.
Well-reviewed local cafe with Facebook and Deliveroo presence but no own domain, losing branded visibility and direct table bookings to competitors.
Social-media-only salon on London Road with active Facebook and Instagram but no own website, limiting discovery beyond existing followers.

linkedin_prospects.reason: Leads a 52-person estate agency sales team across 20 offices — exactly the high-rejection, relationship-driven environment CloseCoach is built to improve.

dts.title: You're waiting 22 weeks for your driving test — here's the hack
dts.hook: Show the DVSA wait-time map, cut to a learner getting a test 3 weeks sooner via a swap. Caption: 'DVSA says 22 weeks. We found one in 3. Here's how.'

dts.title: DVSA's new cancellation rule just created more free slots — here's why
dts.hook: From April 2025 learners must give 10 working days notice to cancel — meaning last-minute drops flood the system. Post explains how DTS alerts you the second a slot appears near you.
dts.cta: Sign up for instant alerts at drivingtestswap.uk

athletics.title: Week 8 of my front lever progression — gym session clip
athletics.hook: Film the tuck → advanced tuck → full front lever attempt. Overlay text: 'Nobody talks about how long this actually takes.' Raw, unfiltered gym footage performs well.
athletics.cta: Follow for weekly calisthenics progress updates

athletics.title: Wednesday sprint session — 60m slow-mo start
athletics.hook: Slow-motion drive phase into full acceleration, finish with stopwatch. Caption: 'Speed is a skill. This is my Wednesday.' Simple, repeatable series format.

aimybiz.title: Your reps don't need more leads. They need to stop fumbling the ones they have.
aimybiz.hook: Opens with a relatable lost-sale story, pivots to showing a 60-second CloseCoach objection drill. Ends: 'We built CloseCoach so your team practices on AI before they lose a real deal.'
aimybiz.cta: Drop a comment or DM for a free team demo

aimybiz.title: 3 signs your sales team needs training — not more cold calls
aimybiz.hook: Slide 1: stat on SME sales conversion rates. Slides 2–4: common objections reps fumble (no budget / send me info / not interested). Slide 5: how CloseCoach builds the muscle memory to handle each one.
aimybiz.cta: Link to AIMyBiz / CloseCoach demo booking
